Focus introduces a multilevel concentration paradigm that hierarchically compresses vision-language inputs at three levels: (1) semantic-guided token pruning based on textual prompts, (2) spatial-temporal blocklevel concentration using localized comparisons, and (3) vectorlevel redundancy removal via motion-aware matching. All concentration steps are tightly co-designed with the architecture to support streaming-friendly, on-chip execution. Focus leverages GEMM tiling, convolution-style layout, and cross-modal attention to minimize off-chip access while enabling high throughput. Implemented as a modular unit within a systolic-array accelerator, Focus achieves $2.4 \times$ speedup and $3.3 \times$ reduction in energy, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art accelerator in both performance and energy efficiency. Full-stack implementation of Focus is open-sourced at https://github.com/dubcyfor3/Focus.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉语言模型 (VLM) 在视频字幕和视觉问答等任务上表现出了强大的性能。然而，它们不断增长的规模和视频级输入导致大量的计算和内存开销，给硬件加速器上的实时部署带来了挑战。虽然先前的工作试图通过令牌修剪或合并来减少冗余，但这些方法通常以粗粒度运行，并且由于全局令牌级操作而产生较高的运行时开销。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Focus，一种流集中架构，它通过渐进式、细粒度的冗余消除有效地加速 VLM 推理。 Focus 引入了一种多级集中范式，在三个级别上分层压缩视觉语言输入：（1）基于文本提示的语义引导标记修剪，（2）使用局部比较的时空块级集中，以及（3）通过运动感知匹配去除矢量级冗余。所有集中步骤均与架构紧密共同设计，以支持流友好的片上执行。 Focus 利用 GEMM 平铺、卷积式布局和跨模式注意力来最大限度地减少片外访问，同时实现高吞吐量。 Focus 作为脉动阵列加速器中的模块化单元实施，可实现 2.4 美元的加速和 3.3 美元的能耗降低，在性能和能效方面均显着优于最先进的加速器。 Focus 的全栈实现在 https://github.com/dubcyfor3/Focus 上开源。

items.title: Cambricon-GS: An Accelerator for 3D Gaussian Splatting Training With Gaussian-Pixel Hybrid Parallelism.
items.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a breakthrough in 3D reconstruction using 3D Gaussians. However, even on highend GPUs like the NVIDIA A100, reconstructing complex scenes remains time-consuming, taking over 15 minutes. The main bottleneck is α-computation, which accounts for 71.25 % of training workload, yet 93.03 % of it is invalid due to the localized influence of Gaussians. To address this issue, we propose Cambricon-GS, an accelerator for 3DGS training with Gaussian-Pixel hybrid parallelism. At the software level, we introduce a hybrid parallel workflow that breaks the limitation of conventional pixel-only parallelism through two key techniques: Center-Pixel Gaussian Culling (CPGC), which eliminates invalid Gaussians early, and SeedDriven Gaussian Region Exploration (SDGRE), which reduces invalid computation for partially valid Gaussians by selectively exploring valid regions. Overall, the workflow significantly reduces α computations, lowering the workload to 17.99 %. At the hardware level, Cambricon-GS decouples α-computation and α blending into GUnits and PUnits, organized in a 2D mesh-based NoC that supports asynchronous execution and efficient data routing. We further boost performance via Gaussian/Pixel load balancing and tiled SSIM based pipelining. The evaluation results show that Cambricon-GS achieves 19.63×, 14.86×, 15.42×, 2.98× and 2.63× speedup, and 78.62×, 63.00×, 61.72×, 3.89× and 3.22× energy saving, compared to A100, GSCore, GBU, GSArch, and GauSPU, respectively, with negligible image quality loss.
items.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯分布 (3DGS) 是使用 3D 高斯进行 3D 重建的突破。然而，即使在 NVIDIA A100 这样的高端 GPU 上，重建复杂场景仍然非常耗时，需要超过 15 分钟。主要瓶颈是α计算，占训练工作量的71.25%，但由于高斯局部影响，93.03%是无效的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Cambricon-GS，这是一种具有高斯像素混合并行性的 3DGS 训练加速器。在软件层面，我们引入了一种混合并行工作流程，通过两项关键技术打破了传统仅像素并行的限制：中心像素高斯剔除（CPGC），它可以尽早消除无效高斯；种子驱动高斯区域探索（SDGRE），它可以通过有选择地探索有效区域来减少部分有效高斯的无效计算。总体而言，该工作流程显着减少了 α 计算，将工作量降低至 17.99%。在硬件层面，Cambricon-GS将α计算和α混合解耦为GUnit和PUnit，组织在基于2D网格的NoC中，支持异步执行和高效的数据路由。我们通过高斯/像素负载平衡和基于平铺 SSIM 的流水线进一步提高性能。评测结果表明，与A100、GSCore、GBU、GSArch、GauSPU相比，Cambricon-GS实现了19.63×、14.86×、15.42×、2.98×和2.63×的加速比，以及78.62×、63.00×、61.72×、3.89×和3.22×的节能。分别，图像质量损失可以忽略不计。

items.title: CLINE: Improving Control Flow Compilation of Quantum Programs with Control Line Encoding.
items.abstract: Important applications like quantum search and quantum simulation rely on control flow implemented by oracle circuits, which may account for up to 99% of the total gate count [1] as oracle circuits consist of expensive multi-controlled (MC) quantum operations that formulate the control flow. Existing efforts optimize them by simplifying Boolean expressions associated with MC gates. They merge MC gates, if associated Boolean expressions are adjacent, to reduce the gate cost. Being more aggressive, our work introduces control line encoding (CLE), a technique that even allows merging non-adjacent MC gates by modifying their control (line) polarity. We further develop a plug-in compiler framework that efficiently applies this technique. The framework is grounded in the following observations: 1) Control flows often commute with one another and can be globally reorganized to maximize their merging by CLE; 2) numerous CLE schemes exist to allow gate merge and we can co-design CLE applications to diminish the overhead of CLE itself. Experiments demonstrate that, compared to the baseline, our framework further reduces the CX and T cost, on average by 54.7% and 56.8%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 量子搜索和量子模拟等重要应用依赖于预言机电路实现的控制流，预言机电路可能占总门数的 99% [1]，因为预言机电路由昂贵的多控 (MC) 量子运算组成，这些运算制定了控制流。现有的工作通过简化与 MC 门相关的布尔表达式来优化它们。如果关联的布尔表达式相邻，它们会合并 MC 门，以减少门成本。更积极的是，我们的工作引入了控制线编码（CLE），这种技术甚至允许通过修改控制（线）极性来合并不相邻的 MC 门。我们进一步开发了一个插件编译器框架，可以有效地应用该技术。该框架基于以下观察结果：1）控制流经常相互交换，并且可以通过 CLE 进行全局重组，以最大限度地合并； 2) 存在许多允许门合并的 CLE 方案，我们可以共同设计 CLE 应用程序以减少 CLE 本身的开销。实验表明，与基线相比，我们的框架进一步降低了 CX 和 T 成本，平均分别降低了 54.7% 和 56.8%。

items.title: VAR-Turbo: Unlocking the Potential of Visual Autoregressive Models Through Dual Redundancy.
items.abstract: Image synthesis task has recently drawn enormous attention from both the academia and the industry due to the recent advancements of generative models, which now can generate photorealistic images with conditional words from human. Among the generative models for image synthesis task, Visual AutoRegressive (VAR) model is a promising avenue due to its strong scalability. Nevertheless, its exorbitant computational cost poses a formidable obstacle to widespread adoption. To this end, we propose a dedicated software/hardware co-design framework dubbed VAR-Turbo for unlocking the potential of VAR models. Specifically, in the software level, we propose a Draft-Free Parallel Decoding scheme by exploiting the Image Redundancy, which can decrease the sample steps by $>80 \%$ , and a combination of Token Aggregation and Dynamic Bypass that capitalizes on the Model Redundancy introduced by the generative Transformer to reduce the computational load by $>60 \%$ . In the hardware level, we propose a dedicated accelerator featuring 1) A Unified Attention Core and 2) Radix Sort Core, which can support the aforementioned algorithm pipeline seamlessly and efficiently. Under the collaborative design and synergy of software and hardware, VAR-Turbo achieves averagely 5047.4x, 210.3x, 6.1x, 3.8x speedups and 24818.2x, 423.5x, 6.0x, 7.8x energy-efficiency improvements over Xeon 8168 CPU, Nvidia V100, ViTCoD and AdapTiV, while maintaining the generation quality.
items.abstract_zh: 由于生成模型的最新进展，图像合成任务最近引起了学术界和工业界的极大关注，该模型现在可以使用人类的条件词生成逼真的图像。在图像合成任务的生成模型中，视觉自回归（VAR）模型由于其强大的可扩展性而成为一种有前途的途径。然而，其高昂的计算成本对广泛采用构成了巨大的障碍。为此，我们提出了一个名为 VAR-Turbo 的专用软件/硬件协同设计框架，用于释放 VAR 模型的潜力。具体来说，在软件层面，我们提出了一种利用图像冗余的无草案并行解码方案，可以将样本步数减少 $>80 \%$ ，并结合令牌聚合和动态旁路，利用生成 Transformer 引入的模型冗余，将计算负载减少 $>60 \%$ 。在硬件层面，我们提出了一个专用加速器，具有 1) 统一注意力核心和 2) 基数排序核心，它可以无缝、高效地支持上述算法管道。在软硬件协同设计和协同作用下，VAR-Turbo 比 Xeon 8168 CPU、Nvidia V100、ViTCoD 和 AdapTiV 平均实现 5047.4x、210.3x、6.1x、3.8x 加速和 24818.2x、423.5x、6.0x、7.8x 能效提升，同时保持一代品质。

items.title: FACE: Fully Overlapped PD Scheduling and Multi-Level Architecture Co-Exploration on Wafer.
items.abstract: The rapid expansion of large language models (LLMs) parameter scales imposes unprecedented demands on compute, memory, and communication resources for inference deployment. Wafer-scale chips, leveraging advanced packaging technologies, deliver high-density integration of compute and memory with high die-to-die (D2D) communication bandwidth, providing a compelling architectural approach to satisfy these resource requirements. However, its unprecedented chip area introduces significant architectural design complexities. Waferscale chips feature a multi-level architecture spanning the wafer, die, and core levels, involving numerous critical design parameters and trade-offs, which still lack systematic understanding and exploration. Moreover, this poses major challenges for LLM serving scheduling. Existing methods, largely adapted from GPUbased systems, fail to fully leverage the advantages of waferscale chips and mitigate their limitations, making it difficult to efficiently translate massive hardware resources into actual performance gains. To address these challenges, we introduce FACE, a coexploration framework for jointly optimizing multi-level architecture and serving scheduling. We first establish a flexible and extensible wafer-scale hardware template to systematically explore the optimal architecture and micro-architecture parameters. Leveraging the fine-grained control and high interconnect bandwidth of wafer-scale chips, FACE implements an LLM scheduling strategy that achieves fully overlapped prefill-decode execution and efficient KV cache management, maximizing hardware resource utilization to improve LLM service quality. Our evaluation demonstrates that FACE can achieve an average overall performance improvement of 3.68 × across various LLM models and datasets compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) LLM serving system on wafer-scale chips.
items.abstract_zh: 大语言模型 (LLM) 参数规模的快速扩展对推理部署的计算、内存和通信资源提出了前所未有的要求。晶圆级芯片利用先进的封装技术，提供计算和内存的高密度集成以及高芯片间 (D2D) 通信带宽，从而提供引人注目的架构方法来满足这些资源需求。然而，其前所未有的芯片面积带来了显着的架构设计复杂性。 Waferscale芯片具有跨越晶圆、芯片和核心级别的多层次架构，涉及众多关键设计参数和权衡，目前仍缺乏系统的理解和探索。此外，这对法学硕士的服务安排提出了重大挑战。现有方法主要改编自基于GPU的系统，无法充分利用晶圆级芯片的优势并减轻其局限性，从而难以有效地将海量硬件资源转化为实际的性能提升。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 FACE，一个用于联合优化多级架构和服务调度的协同探索框架。我们首先建立灵活且可扩展的晶圆级硬件模板，系统地探索最佳架构和微架构参数。 FACE利用晶圆级芯片的细粒度控制和高互连带宽，实现LLM调度策略，实现完全重叠的预填充-解码执行和高效的KV缓存管理，最大化硬件资源利用率，提高LLM服务质量。我们的评估表明，与晶圆级芯片上最先进的 (SOTA) LLM 服务系统相比，FACE 在各种 LLM 模型和数据集上的平均整体性能提高了 3.68 倍。

items.title: Towards Resource-Efficient Serverless LLM Inference with SLINFER.
items.abstract: The rise of LLMs has driven demand for private serverless deployments, characterized by moderate-sized models and infrequent requests. While existing serverless solutions follow exclusive GPU allocation, we take a step back to explore modern platforms and find that: Emerging CPU architectures with built-in accelerators are capable of serving LLMs but remain underutilized, and both CPUs and GPUs can accommodate multiple LLMs simultaneously. We propose SLINFER, a resource-efficient serverless inference scheme tailored for small- to mid-sized LLMs that enables elastic and on-demand sharing across heterogeneous hardware. SLINFER tackles three fundamental challenges: (1) precise, fine-grained compute resource allocation at token-level to handle fluctuating computational demands; (2) a coordinated and forward-looking memory scaling mechanism to detect out-ofmemory hazards and reduce operational overhead; and (3) a dual approach that consolidates fragmented instances through proactive preemption and reactive bin-packing. Experimental results on 4 32-core CPUs and 4 A100 GPUs show that SLINFER improves serving capacity by 47% - 62% through sharing, while further leveraging CPUs boosts this to 86% - 154%.
items.abstract_zh: 法学硕士的兴起推动了对私有无服务器部署的需求，其特点是中等规模的模型和不频繁的请求。虽然现有的无服务器解决方案遵循专有的 GPU 分配，但我们退后一步探索现代平台并发现：具有内置加速器的新兴 CPU 架构能够为 LLM 提供服务，但仍未得到充分利用，并且 CPU 和 GPU 都可以同时容纳多个 LLM。我们提出了 SLINFER，这是一种专为中小型法学硕士量身定制的资源高效型无服务器推理方案，可实现跨异构硬件的弹性和按需共享。 SLINFER 解决了三个基本挑战：（1）在代币级别进行精确、细粒度的计算资源分配，以处理波动的计算需求； (2) 协调且具有前瞻性的内存扩展机制，用于检测内存不足危险并减少运营开销； (3) 通过主动抢占和被动装箱来整合碎片实例的双重方法。在4个32核CPU和4个A100 GPU上的实验结果表明，SLINFER通过共享将服务能力提高了47% - 62%，而进一步利用CPU则将其提高到86% - 154%。

items.title: HDPAT: Hierarchical Distributed Page Address Translation for Wafer-Scale GPUs.
items.abstract: A Wafer-scale GPU connects a large number of chiplets via a high-bandwidth, low-latency interposer-based network, promising to overcome the communication bottleneck of traditional multi-GPU systems. While prior work has prototyped wafer-scale GPUs to demonstrate technical feasibility, scaling to massive chiplet counts creates new bottlenecks: virtual-tophysical address translation becomes severely constrained by massive concurrent requests and long multi-hop network latencies. We propose HDPAT, a hardware-accelerated distributed address translation system that addresses this challenge through three complementary techniques: (1) Concentric caching converts near-IOMMU chiplets into hierarchical translation caches based on their distance to the IOMMU. A lightweight rotation mechanism ensures that there is always a nearby chiplet that can provide translation caching. (2) The redirection table further reduces the burden of IOMMU by delegating translations to caching chiplets, and (3) Prefetching proactively delivers potentially needed address translation into the chiplet to improve translation cache hit rate. Experimental results on 14 representative workloads show that HDPAT improves overall performance by an average of $1.57 \times$ .
items.abstract_zh: 晶圆级 GPU 通过高带宽、低延迟的基于中介层的网络连接大量小芯片，有望克服传统多 GPU 系统的通信瓶颈。虽然之前的工作已经制作了晶圆级 GPU 原型来证明技术可行性，但扩展到大量小芯片数量会产生新的瓶颈：虚拟到物理地址转换受到大量并发请求和长多跳网络延迟的严重限制。我们提出了 HDPAT，这是一种硬件加速的分布式地址转换系统，它通过三种互补技术来解决这一挑战：（1）同心缓存根据 IOMMU 芯片组与 IOMMU 的距离将其转换为分层转换缓存。轻量级旋转机制可确保附近始终有一个可以提供转换缓存的小芯片。 (2) 重定向表通过将翻译委托给缓存小芯片，进一步减轻了 IOMMU 的负担，以及 (3) 预取主动将可能需要的地址翻译传递到小芯片中，以提高翻译缓存命中率。 14 个代表性工作负载的实验结果表明，HDPAT 平均将整体性能提高了 1.57 美元\times$。

items.title: DC-MBQC: A Distributed Compilation Framework for Measurement-Based Quantum Computing.
items.abstract: Distributed quantum computing (DQC) is a promising technique for scaling up quantum systems. While significant progress has been made in DQC for quantum circuit models, there exists much less research on DQC for measurement-based quantum computing (MBQC), which is a universal quantum computing model that is essentially different from the circuit model and particularly well-suited to photonic quantum platforms. In this paper, we propose DC-MBQC, the first distributed quantum compilation framework tailored for MBQC. We identify and address two key challenges in enabling DQC for MBQC. First, for task allocation among quantum processing units (QPUs), we develop an adaptive graph partitioning algorithm that preserves the structure of the graph state while balancing the workload across QPUs. Second, for inter-QPU communication, we introduce the layer scheduling problem and propose an algorithm to solve it. Regrading realistic hardware requirements, we optimize the execution time of running quantum programs and the corresponding required photon lifetime to avoid fatal failures caused by photon loss. Our experiments demonstrate a $7.46 \times$ improvement on required photon lifetime and $6.82 \times$ speedup with 8 fully-connected QPUs, which further confirm the advantage of distributed quantum computing in photonic systems.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式量子计算（DQC）是一种很有前景的扩展量子系统的技术。虽然量子电路模型的DQC已经取得了重大进展，但针对基于测量的量子计算（MBQC）的DQC研究却少之又少，MBQC是一种通用的量子计算模型，与电路模型有本质的不同，特别适合光子量子平台。在本文中，我们提出了 DC-MBQC，这是第一个专为 MBQC 量身定制的分布式量子编译框架。我们确定并解决了为 MBQC 启用 DQC 的两个关键挑战。首先，对于量子处理单元（QPU）之间的任务分配，我们开发了一种自适应图分区算法，该算法保留图状态的结构，同时平衡 QPU 之间的工作负载。其次，对于 QPU 间通信，我们引入了层调度问题并提出了一种解决该问题的算法。根据现实的硬件要求，我们优化了运行量子程序的执行时间和相应的所需光子寿命，以避免因光子丢失而导致的致命故障。我们的实验证明，8 个全连接 QPU 所需的光子寿命提高了 7.46 美元，加速提高了 6.82 美元，这进一步证实了分布式量子计算在光子系统中的优势。

items.title: Scaling Graph Neural Network Training via Geometric Optimization.
items.abstract: Wafer-scale computing has emerged as an alternative solution to sustain performance scaling in the post-Moore era, driven by recent technology advancements such as chiplet integration. This enables considerable computing and storage capabilities on a single chip, making it capable of accommodating large machine learning models and datasets. Recent efforts have heralded the promise of wafer-scale architectures for deep learning inference and training. However, scaling the training of Graph Neural Networks in wafer-scale architecture remains a challenge and is relatively unexplored due to irregularities in gradient propagation as well as physical constraints from flat on-chip topologies. In this paper, we propose Aster, a topology-aware framework designed to efficiently support GNN training on arbitrary wafer-scale architectures. The proposed framework, as opposed to the current application or topology-specific heuristics, can be generalized to support any network topology and irregular GNN datasets. Specifically, we mathematically formulate commonly-seen network topologies in their geometric representation and prioritize communication efficiency during GNN workload partitioning and mapping. Based on the geometric representation, we propose a quadratic assignment problem solver to efficiently map irregular dataflows to a flat topology with reduced communication distance. The simulation results show that Aster can achieve performance speedup by $2.91 \times, 1.50 \times, 1.84 \times$ , and $1.58 \times$ in Mesh and speedup by $3.84 \times, 1.56 \times, 2.05 \times$ , and $1.49 \times$ in Torus on average compared to Mini-cut [1], ScalaGraph [2], ChunkV [3], and Chunk-E [4], respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 在小芯片集成等最新技术进步的推动下，晶圆级计算已成为后摩尔时代维持性能扩展的替代解决方案。这使得单芯片具有相当大的计算和存储能力，使其能够容纳大型机器学习模型和数据集。最近的努力预示着晶圆级架构在深度学习推理和训练方面的前景。然而，由于梯度传播的不规则性以及平面片上拓扑的物理限制，在晶圆级架构中扩展图神经网络的训练仍然是一个挑战，并且相对未经探索。在本文中，我们提出了 Aster，这是一种拓扑感知框架，旨在有效支持任意晶圆级架构上的 GNN 训练。与当前的应用程序或特定于拓扑的启发式方法相反，所提出的框架可以推广到支持任何网络拓扑和不规则的 GNN 数据集。具体来说，我们以数学方式在几何表示中制定了常见的网络拓扑，并在 GNN 工作负载分区和映射期间优先考虑通信效率。基于几何表示，我们提出了一种二次分配问题求解器，可以有效地将不规则数据流映射到通信距离缩短的平坦拓扑。仿真结果表明，与 Mini-cut [1]、ScalaGraph 相比，Aster 在 Mesh 中平均性能提速 $2.91 \times、1.50 \times$、1.84 \times$ 和 $1.58 \times$，在 Torus 中平均提速 $3.84 \times、1.56 \times$、2.05 \times$ 和 $1.49 \times$分别是 [2]、ChunkV [3] 和 Chunk-E [4]。

items.title: Near-Zero-Overhead Freshness for Recommendation Systems via Inference-Side Model Updates.
items.abstract: Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) underpin personalized services but face a critical freshnessaccuracy tradeoff due to massive parameter synchronization overheads. Production DLRMs deploy decoupled training/inference clusters, where synchronizing petabyte-scale embedding tables (EMTs) causes multi-minute staleness, degrading recommendation quality and revenue. We observe that (1) inference nodes exhibit sustained CPU underutilization (peak $\leq 20 \%$ ), and (2) EMT gradients possess intrinsic low-rank structure, enabling compact update representation. We present LiveUpdate, a system that eliminates inter-cluster synchronization by colocating Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) trainers within inference nodes. LiveUpdate addresses two core challenges: (1) dynamic rank adaptation via singular value monitoring to constrain memory overhead ( $ of EMTs), and (2) NUMA-aware resource scheduling with hardware-enforced QoS to eliminate updateinference contention (P99 latency impact $ ). Evaluations show LiveUpdate reduces update costs by $2 \times$ versus delta-update baselines while achieving higher accuracy within 1-hour windows. By transforming idle inference resources into freshness engines, LiveUpdate delivers online model updates while outperforming state- of-the-art delta-update methods by $\mathbf{0. 0 4 - 0. 2 4 \%}$ in accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 支持个性化服务，但由于大量参数同步开销，面临着关键的新鲜度准确性权衡。生产 DLRM 部署解耦的训练/推理集群，其中同步 PB 级嵌入表 (EMT) 会导致多分钟陈旧，从而降低推荐质量和收入。我们观察到 (1) 推理节点表现出持续的 CPU 利用率不足（峰值 $\leq 20 \%$ ），以及 (2) EMT 梯度具有内在的低秩结构，从而实现紧凑的更新表示。我们推出了 LiveUpdate，这是一个通过在推理节点内共置低秩适应 (LoRA) 训练器来消除集群间同步的系统。 LiveUpdate 解决了两个核心挑战：(1) 通过奇异值监控进行动态排名自适应，以限制内存开销（EMT 的 $），以及 (2) 具有硬件强制 QoS 的 NUMA 感知资源调度，以消除更新推理争用（P99 延迟影响 $）。评估显示，与增量更新基线相比，LiveUpdate 将更新成本降低了 2 美元，同时在 1 小时窗口内实现了更高的准确性。通过将闲置推理资源转化为新鲜度引擎，LiveUpdate 提供在线模型更新，同时优于最先进的增量更新方法 $\mathbf{0. 0 4 - 0. 2 4 \%}$ 准确度。

items.title: Area Bloating and the Future of Specialization.
items.abstract: Throughout history, technology trends have greatly influenced the development of computer architecture. For the past decade, continuing transistor density scaling combined with stalling voltage scaling created great opportunities for specialization. As a step forward from multi-core processors, hardware accelerators make use of vastly available transistors by dedicating them to specific applications, in exchange for performance and energy efficiency. Unfortunately, the scaling of transistor size is now also slowing down. The complete failure of Moore's Law will raise challenges and demand new approaches with specialization. In this work, we model technology scaling, accelerator scaling, and chip scaling to determine future demands of hardware acceleration in a collection of benchmarks for the next eight technology nodes. We show that if current approaches continue, area is becoming a major limiting factor of achievable performance. In a phenomenon we call area bloating, the area and hence manufacturing cost of chips can increase by at least $78.4 \times$ and $117.4 \times$ respectively from $\mathbf{3 n m}$ to A1.8 to match performance gain expectations like those in the past. 3D stacking can deliver more area under the same footprint, at the cost of multiplied power density. But for a limited number of layers, different from the dark silicon prediction, power density plateaus and silicon can be kept bright under liquid cooling. Architectural innovation is required to combat area bloating. We present several directions for future studies. Reduced levels of integration and reduced levels of specialization can help future accelerators adapt to these new trends. By adding limited generality to accelerators, reconfigurable specialization can combat area bloating in platform-specific SoCs, saving significant amounts of area. Future architectures must also consider longevity as chip lifetime increases as a result of slow adoption.
items.abstract_zh: 纵观历史，技术趋势极大地影响了计算机体系结构的发展。在过去的十年中，持续的晶体管密度缩放与停滞的电压缩放相结合为专业化创造了巨大的机会。作为多核处理器的进步，硬件加速器利用大量可用的晶体管，将其专用于特定应用，以换取性能和能源效率。不幸的是，晶体管尺寸的缩小现在也正在放缓。摩尔定律的彻底失败将带来挑战并需要专业化的新方法。在这项工作中，我们对技术扩展、加速器扩展和芯片扩展进行建模，以确定未来八个技术节点的基准集合中硬件加速的未来需求。我们表明，如果继续采用当前的方法，面积将成为可实现性能的主要限制因素。在我们称之为面积膨胀的现象中，从 $\mathbf{3 n m}$ 到 A1.8，芯片的面积和制造成本可以分别增加至少 $78.4 \times$ 和 $117.4 \times$，以匹配过去的性能增益预期。 3D 堆叠可以在相同的占地面积下提供更多的面积，但代价是功率密度成倍增加。但对于有限数量的层，与暗硅预测不同，功率密度稳定并且硅可以在液体冷却下保持明亮。需要进行架构创新来对抗面积膨胀。我们提出了未来研究的几个方向。降低集成水平和降低专业化水平可以帮助未来的加速器适应这些新趋势。通过为加速器添加有限的通用性，可重新配置的专业化可以解决特定平台 SoC 中的面积膨胀问题，从而节省大量面积。未来的架构还必须考虑寿命，因为采用缓慢会导致芯片寿命增加。

items.title: TENET-v2: Applying Relation-Centric Notation to Model and Optimize Data Swizzle in the Cache of Modern NPU.
items.abstract: Swizzle is a data access pattern optimization technique by reorganizing the execution order of computational tasks to improve the cache locality in modern NPUs. Existing analysis and optimization techniques lack support for swizzleaware modeling on NPUs and fail to effectively capture cache behavior across diverse swizzle configurations. To this end, we propose TENET-v2, a framework for modeling and optimizing swizzle. We introduce a relation-centric notation to characterize different cache access patterns, thus exploring wider swizzle space. Then, we propose a hybrid performance model for cache analysis. The proposed performance model uses an analytical approach to quantify cache miss behavior under unsaturated cache conditions (non-saturated misses), and employs a simulation method combined with an early exiting mechanism to rapidly model cache behavior under saturated cache conditions (saturated misses). Experimental evaluations demonstrate that TENET-v2 achieves an average absolute error of 1.05 % in read hit rate compared to real-world hardware. Evaluation on a variety of DNNs shows that TENET-v2 outperforms existing tensor program optimizers by up to $\mathbf{1. 5} \times$ on A100 GPUs. We also demonstrate NPU cache size optimization based on TENET-v2.
items.abstract_zh: Swizzle 是一种数据访问模式优化技术，通过重新组织计算任务的执行顺序来提高现代 NPU 中的缓存局部性。现有的分析和优化技术缺乏对 NPU 上 swizzleaware 建模的支持，并且无法有效捕获跨不同 swizzle 配置的缓存行为。为此，我们提出了 TENET-v2，一个用于建模和优化 swizzle 的框架。我们引入了一种以关系为中心的表示法来表征不同的缓存访问模式，从而探索更广泛的混合空间。然后，我们提出了一种用于缓存分析的混合性能模型。所提出的性能模型使用分析方法来量化不饱和缓存条件下的缓存未命中行为（非饱和未命中），并采用与早期退出机制相结合的模拟方法来快速建模饱和缓存条件下的缓存行为（饱和未命中）。实验评估表明，与实际硬件相比，TENET-v2 的读取命中率平均绝对误差为 1.05%。对各种 DNN 的评估表明，TENET-v2 的性能优于现有张量程序优化器高达 $\mathbf{1。 5} \times$ 在 A100 GPU 上。我们还演示了基于 TENET-v2 的 NPU 缓存大小优化。

items.title: TraceRTL: Agile Performance Evaluation for Microarchitecture Exploration.
items.abstract: While agile chip development methodologies have accelerated RTL design and simulation, performance evaluation remains constrained by three challenges: (1) inefficient feature prototyping caused by the tight coupling between functional correctness and performance evaluation, particularly for large-scale, error-prone microarchitectures; (2) limited workloads due to incomplete peripheral/software environments or unavailable source code; and (3) time-consuming warm-up phases in sampling-based simulation, required to mitigate cold-start effects. To address these challenges, we propose TRACERTL, an agile, trace-driven performance evaluation methodology that decouples the functional and performance components of CPU RTL designs. It introduces three techniques: (1) a trace-driven performance exploration framework that bypasses full functional correctness while preserving performance accuracy; (2) a trace transformation technique, TraceBridge, that replays traces across different formats and instruction sets; and (3) a fast warm-up strategy, TraceDedup, that eliminates redundant traces and efficiently initializes microarchitectural states. Using TRACERTL, we develop the first trace-driven RTL CPU derived from XiangShan, a high-performance out-of-order RISC-V processor. TRACERTL achieves performance accuracies of 99.87% and 99.86% on SPECint2017 and SPECfp2017, respectively. With TraceBridge, we evaluate x86-based Google workload traces on a RISC-V RTL CPU and reveal distinct memory-bound behavior. TraceDedup further accelerates warm-up phases in sampling-based simulations by $\text{1. 5} \times$ to $\text{1 1. 8} \times$ .
items.abstract_zh: 虽然敏捷芯片开发方法加速了RTL设计和仿真，但性能评估仍然受到三个挑战的限制：（1）功能正确性和性能评估之间的紧密耦合导致功能原型设计效率低下，特别是对于大规模、容易出错的微架构； (2) 外设/软件环境不完善或源代码不可用导致工作量有限； (3) 基于采样的模拟中耗时的预热阶段，需要减轻冷启动效应。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 TRACERTL，这是一种敏捷的、跟踪驱动的性能评估方法，可解耦 CPU RTL 设计的功能和性能组件。它引入了三种技术：（1）跟踪驱动的性能探索框架，绕过完整的功能正确性，同时保持性能准确性； (2) 跟踪转换技术 TraceBridge，可跨不同格式和指令集重放跟踪； (3) 快速预热策略 TraceDedup，可消除冗余痕迹并有效初始化微架构状态。使用TRACERTL，我们开发了第一个源自XiangShan（高性能乱序RISC-V 处理器）的跟踪驱动RTL CPU。 TRACERTL 在 SPECint2017 和 SPECfp2017 上分别实现了 99.87% 和 99.86% 的性能准确度。借助 TraceBridge，我们在 RISC-V RTL CPU 上评估基于 x86 的 Google 工作负载跟踪，并揭示不同的内存绑定行为。 TraceDedup 通过 $\text{1.进一步加速基于采样的模拟中的预热阶段。 5} \times$ 到 $\text{1 1. 8} \times$ .

items.title: Towards Compute-Aware In-Switch Computing for LLMs Tensor-Parallelism on Multi-GPU Systems.
items.abstract: Tensor parallelism (TP) in large-scale LLM inference and training introduces frequent collective operations that dominate inter-GPU communication. While in-switch computing, exemplified by NVLink SHARP (NVLS), accelerates collective operations by reducing redundant data transfer, its communication-centric design philosophy introduces the mismatch between its communication mode and the memory semantic requirement of LLM's computation kernel. Such a mismatch isolates the compute and communication phases, resulting in underutilized resources and limited overlap in multi-GPU systems. To address the limitation, we propose CAIS, the first ComputeAware In-Switch computing framework that aligns communication modes with computation's memory semantics requirement. CAIS consists of three integral techniques: (1) compute-aware ISA and microarchitecture extension to enable compute-aware in-switch computing. (2) merging-aware TB (Thread Block) coordination to improve the temporal alignment for efficient request merging. (3) graph-level dataflow optimizer to achieve a tight cross-kernel overlap. Evaluations on LLM workloads show that CAIS achieves $1.38 \times$ average end-to-end training speedup over the SOTA NVLS-enabled solution, and $1.61 \times$ over T3, the SOTA compute-communicate overlap solutions but do not leverage NVLS, demonstrating its effectiveness in accelerating TP on multi-GPU systems.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模 LLM 推理和训练中的张量并行性 (TP) 引入了主导 GPU 间通信的频繁集体操作。虽然以 NVLink SHARP (NVLS) 为代表的交换机内计算通过减少冗余数据传输来加速集体操作，但其以通信为中心的设计理念引入了其通信模式与 LLM 计算内核的内存语义要求之间的不匹配。这种不匹配会隔离计算和通信阶段，导致多 GPU 系统中的资源未得到充分利用和有限的重叠。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 CAIS，这是第一个 ComputeAware In-Switch 计算框架，它将通信模式与计算的内存语义要求保持一致。 CAIS 由三种集成技术组成：(1) 计算感知 ISA 和微架构扩展，以实现计算感知交换机内计算。 (2) 合并感知 TB（线程块）协调，以改善时间对齐以实现高效的请求合并。 (3)图级数据流优化器实现紧密的跨内核重叠。对 LLM 工作负载的评估表明，CAIS 比支持 SOTA NVLS 的解决方案实现了 1.38 美元的平均端到端训练加速，比 T3（SOTA 计算通信重叠解决方案但不利用 NVLS）实现了 1.61 美元的平均端到端训练加速，证明了其在多 GPU 系统上加速 TP 方面的有效性。

items.title: LEGO: Supporting LLM-Enhanced Games with One Gaming GPU.
items.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been increasingly applied to gaming, with large language models (LLMs) playing a key role in character control. However, efficiently co-locating game rendering and LLM inference on one GPU presents challenges due to resource constraints, diverse latency requirements, and fine-grained task scheduling. We propose LEGO, an algorithm-system co-design that enables the efficient co-location of LLM inference and game rendering tasks. Algorithmwise, LEGO features a resource-oriented layer-skipping adaptor, which distills knowledge from skipped layers to reduce computational demand while maintaining inference accuracy. System-wise, LEGO proposes a headroom-maximizing LLM scheduler, which dynamically partitions inference tasks to utilize available rendering headroom. Evaluations on an Nvidia RTX 4090 show that LEGO meets latency targets in all scenarios, improves rendering headroom utilization by up to 28.6 %, and reduces LLM inference accuracy loss by up to 86.3 % compared to current layer-skipping approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 越来越多地应用于游戏，大型语言模型 (LLM) 在角色控制中发挥着关键作用。然而，由于资源限制、不同的延迟要求和细粒度的任务调度，在一个 GPU 上高效地共置游戏渲染和 LLM 推理会带来挑战。我们提出了 LEGO，一种算法系统协同设计，可以实现 LLM 推理和游戏渲染任务的高效协同定位。在算法方面，乐高具有面向资源的跳层适配器，它可以从跳过的层中提取知识，以减少计算需求，同时保持推理准确性。在系统方面，乐高提出了一个净空最大化的 LLM 调度程序，它动态分区推理任务以利用可用的渲染净空。对 Nvidia RTX 4090 的评估表明，与当前的跳层方法相比，LEGO 满足所有场景下的延迟目标，将渲染余量利用率提高高达 28.6%，并将 LLM 推理精度损失降低高达 86.3%。

items.title: TurboFuzz: FPGA Accelerated Hardware Fuzzing for Processor Agile Verification.
items.abstract: Verification is a critical process for ensuring the correctness of modern processors. The increasing complexity of processor designs and the emergence of new instruction set architectures (ISAs) like RISC-V have created demands for more agile and efficient verification methodologies, particularly regarding verification efficiency and faster coverage convergence. While simulation-based approaches now attempt to incorporate advanced software testing techniques such as fuzzing to improve coverage, they face significant limitations when applied to processor verification, notably poor performance and inadequate test case quality. Hardware-accelerated solutions using FPGA or ASIC platforms have tried to address these issues, yet they struggle with challenges including host-FPGA communication overhead, inefficient test pattern generation, and suboptimal implementation of the entire multi-step verification process. In this paper, we present TurboFuzz, an end-to-end hardwareaccelerated verification framework that implements the entire Test Generation-Simulation-Coverage Feedback loop on a single FPGA for modern processor verification. TurboFuzz enhances test quality through optimized test case (seed) control flow, efficient inter-seed scheduling, and hybrid fuzzer integration, thereby improving coverage and execution efficiency. Additionally, it employs a feedback-driven generation mechanism to accelerate coverage convergence. Experimental results show that TurboFuzz achieves up to 2.23× more coverage collection than software-based fuzzers within the same time budget, and up to 571× performance speedup when detecting real-world issues, while maintaining full visibility and debugging capabilities with moderate area overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 验证是确保现代处理器正确性的关键过程。处理器设计的复杂性不断增加，以及 RISC-V 等新指令集架构 (ISA) 的出现，产生了对更敏捷、更高效的验证方法的需求，特别是在验证效率和更快的覆盖收敛方面。虽然基于模拟的方法现在试图结合模糊测试等先进的软件测试技术来提高覆盖率，但它们在应用于处理器验证时面临着巨大的限制，特别是性能不佳和测试用例质量不足。使用 FPGA 或 ASIC 平台的硬件加速解决方案试图解决这些问题，但它们面临着主机-FPGA 通信开销、低效的测试模式生成以及整个多步骤验证过程的次优实现等挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 TurboFuzz，这是一种端到端硬件加速验证框架，可在单个 FPGA 上实现整个测试生成-模拟-覆盖反馈循环，以进行现代处理器验证。 TurboFuzz 通过优化的测试用例（种子）控制流程、高效的种子间调度和混合模糊器集成来提高测试质量，从而提高覆盖率和执行效率。此外，它采用反馈驱动的生成机制来加速覆盖收敛。实验结果表明，在相同的时间预算内，TurboFuzz 的覆盖率收集比基于软件的模糊器高出 2.23 倍，在检测现实问题时性能加速高达 571 倍，同时以适度的面积开销保持完整的可见性和调试功能。

items.title: LRM-GPU: Alleviating Synchronization Overhead for Multi-Chiplet GPU Architecture.
items.abstract: With the slowdown of process scaling and the advancement of packaging technologies, multi-chiplet GPUs have emerged as a highly promising architecture to improve the scalability of GPU performance further. Moreover, requiring adherence to atomicity and memory consistency models for shared data efficient synchronization is crucial to leverage the performance advantages of the multi-chiplet GPU architecture. However, the memory systems of multi-chiplet GPUs introduce deeper cache hierarchies and increased non-uniformity, both of which significantly exacerbate the overhead of synchronization. Specifically, acquire/release synchronization operations should invalidate/flush caches, an overhead that is significantly increased by the presence of additional cache level, and atomic operations for synchronization performed across chiplets are further impacted by the limited bandwidth of inter-chiplet links. To address these challenges, this paper proposes LRM-GPU to provide efficient synchronization support for multi-chiplet GPUs. In order to reduce the overhead caused by the additional cache level, LRM-GPU leverages lazy release consistency in multi-chiplet GPUs, whereby the additional level of cache only performs coherence actions when the ownership of synchronization variables changes between different chiplets. LRM-GPU also implements a directory in the last-level cache to track the synchronization variables. To mitigate the overhead of atomic operations for inter-chiplet synchronization under limited interchiplet bandwidth, LRM-GPU proposes an in-network synchronization atomic merging unit to merge atomic requests across chiplets, thereby reducing the inter-chiplet synchronization traffic of atomic operations. Experimental evaluation demonstrates that, compared with the MCM-GPU, LRM-GPU achieves an average speedup of $1.33 \times$ . Moreover, compared with the state-of-the-art work HMG, it also achieves the speedup of $1.22 \times$ , reduces 52% of inter-chiplet traffic, and reduces 32% of energy consumption on average.
items.abstract_zh: 随着工艺扩展的放缓和封装技术的进步，多芯片 GPU 已成为一种非常有前途的架构，可以进一步提高 GPU 性能的可扩展性。此外，要求遵守原子性和内存一致性模型以实现共享数据的高效同步对于利用多芯片 GPU 架构的性能优势至关重要。然而，多芯片 GPU 的内存系统引入了更深的缓存层次结构并增加了不均匀性，这两者都显着加剧了同步开销。具体来说，获取/释放同步操作应该使高速缓存无效/刷新，额外的高速缓存级别的存在会显着增加开销，并且跨小芯片执行的同步原子操作会进一步受到小芯片间链路的有限带宽的影响。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出LRM-GPU，为多chiplet GPU提供高效的同步支持。为了减少额外缓存级别带来的开销，LRM-GPU 利用多 Chiplet GPU 中的延迟释放一致性，即当同步变量的所有权在不同 Chiplet 之间发生变化时，额外缓存级别仅执行一致性操作。 LRM-GPU还在末级缓存中实现了一个目录来跟踪同步变量。为了减轻有限的chiplet间带宽下的chiplet间同步原子操作的开销，LRM-GPU提出了一种网络内同步原子合并单元来合并跨chiplet的原子请求，从而减少原子操作的chiplet间同步流量。实验评估表明，与MCM-GPU相比，LRM-GPU平均加速了$1.33 \times$。而且，与最先进的工作 HMG 相比，它还实现了 1.22 × 美元的加速，减少了 52% 的 Chiplet 间流量，平均降低了 32% 的能耗。

items.title: HERO-Sign: Hierarchical Tuning and Efficient Compiler-Time GPU Optimizations for SPHINCS+ Signature Generation.
items.abstract: SPHINCS + is a stateless hash-based signature scheme known for its strong post-quantum security, but it suffers from slow signature speed due to the heavy use of hash operations. The parallel architecture of GPUs offers a potential advantage for accelerating the computation of SPHINCS + signatures. However, existing GPU-based optimization efforts for SPHINCS+ either do not fully exploit the inherent parallelism of its Merkle Tree-based structure, or lack fine-grained, compilerlevel customization tailored to its diverse computational kernels. This paper proposes HERO-Sign, which adopts hierarchical tuning methodologies and efficient compiler-time GPU optimizations for SPHINCS + . HERO-Sign rethinks the parallelization potential arising from data independence in SPHINCS + , components, including FORS (Forest of Random Subsets), MSS (Merkle Signature Scheme, and WOTS + (Winternitz One-Time Signature Plus). First, it introduces a Tree Fusion strategy for FORS, whose structure contains a large number of branches. Our FORS Fusion strategy is supported by an automated Tree Tuning search algorithm, allowing it to adapt and optimize fusion schemes across various GPU platforms. To further enhance performance, HERO-Sign adopts an adaptive compilation strategy that accounts for the varying effectiveness of compiler optimizations across different SPHINCS + component kernels (FORS_Sign, TREE_Sign, WOTS + _Sign). This strategy automatically selects between PTX and native branches during the compilation phase to maximize efficiency. For multiple batches of message signatures, HERO-Sign focuses on optimizing kernel-level overlapping and employs a Task Graph-based construction strategy to minimize multi-stream idle time and reduce kernel launch overhead. Compared to state-of-the-art GPU implementations, under the SPHINCS + -128f, SPHINCS + -192f and SPHINCS + 256f parameter sets, HERO-Sign demonstrates an enhanced throughput of $\mathbf{1. 2 8} \times \mathbf{- 3. 1 3} \times \mathbf{, ~} \mathbf{1. 2 8} \times \mathbf{- 2. 9 2} \times$ , and $\mathbf{1. 2 4} \times \mathbf{- 2. 6 0} \times$ on RTX 4090. Similar performance improvements have also been achieved on other architectures, including the A100, H100, and GTX 2080. HERO-Sign also achieves a two-order-of-magnitude reduction in kernel launch latency.
items.abstract_zh: SPHINCS+是一种基于哈希的无状态签名方案，以其强大的后量子安全性而闻名，但由于大量使用哈希运算，签名速度较慢。 GPU 的并行架构为加速 SPHINCS + 签名的计算提供了潜在的优势。然而，现有的基于 GPU 的 SPHINCS+ 优化工作要么没有充分利用其基于 Merkle 树的结构的固有并行性，要么缺乏针对其不同计算内核的细粒度、编译器级定制。本文提出了 HERO-Sign，它采用分层调优方法和针对 SPHINCS + 的高效编译时 GPU 优化。 HERO-Sign 重新思考了 SPHINCS + 组件中数据独立性带来的并行化潜力，包括 FORS（随机子集森林）、MSS（Merkle 签名方案）和 WOTS +（Winternitz One-Time Signature Plus）。首先，它为 FORS 引入了一种树融合策略，其结构包含大量分支。我们的 FORS Fusion 策略由自动树调优搜索算法支持，使其能够适应和优化跨各种 GPU 的融合方案为了进一步提高性能，HERO-Sign 采用了自适应编译策略，该策略考虑了不同 SPHINCS + 组件内核（FORS_Sign、TREE_Sign、WOTS + _Sign）之间编译器优化的不同效果，该策略在编译阶段自动在 PTX 和本机分支之间进行选择，以最大限度地提高效率，对于多批消息签名，HERO-Sign 专注于优化内核级重叠，并采用基于任务图的构建策略来最大限度地减少多流空闲时间并减少内核启动。与最先进的 GPU 实现相比，在 SPHINCS + -128f、SPHINCS + -192f 和 SPHINCS + 256f 参数集下，HERO-Sign 的吞吐量提高了 $\mathbf{1. 2 8} \times \mathbf{- 3. 1 3} \times \mathbf{, ~} \mathbf{1. RTX 4090 上的 \times \mathbf{- 2. 9 2} \times$ 和 $\mathbf{1.2 4} \times \mathbf{- 2. 6 0} \times$。在其他架构（包括 A100、H100 和 GTX 2080）上也实现了类似的性能改进。HERO-Sign 还实现了内核启动延迟减少了两个数量级。

items.title: An Efficient and Scalable Hardware Architecture for Number Theoretic Transform on FPGA with Design Automation.
items.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) has become a promising approach to protecting data privacy in emerging application scenarios. Unfortunately, FHE suffers from significant processing speed degradation compared to plaintext computation, with one of the primary bottlenecks being the time-consuming Number Theoretic Transform (NTT). Therefore, accelerating NTT to accommodate various FHE parameters is crucial to advancing FHE towards practical use. With highly reconfigurable and performant logical fabrics, Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) have exhibited great potential in NTT acceleration. By decomposing large-point NTT with strong data dependency into independent and simple small-point NTTs, the emerging Ten-step NTT (TNTT) algorithms intuitively enable higher parallelism and thereby have the potential to explore better performance compared to traditional algorithms. However, our quantitative analysis reveals that TNTT exhibits significant performance degradation as parallelism increases due to additional varying-size transpositions and Hadamard products. This paper proposes AutoNest, an efficient and scalable hardware architecture, along with an accelerator auto-generation framework for TNTT. The proposed hardware architecture maximizes performance by 1) adopting a 2D block decomposition dataflow to address critical path delays in transpose logic, thereby improving clock frequency. 2) integrating algorithm-level costfree twiddle factor fusion to reduce the number of modular multiplications in Hadamard products, thereby allowing higher parallelism on chip. Moreover, we also deliver an accelerator generation framework conducting automated design space exploration to elaborate a performant TNTT architecture under the target FPGAs' resource budget for user-defined FHE parameters. Experimental results on the AMD-Xilinx U280 FPGA demonstrate that NTT accelerators generated by AutoNest achieve an average speedup of $2.31 \times$ compared to prior designs.
items.abstract_zh: 全同态加密（FHE）已成为新兴应用场景中保护数据隐私的一种有前景的方法。不幸的是，与明文计算相比，FHE 的处理速度显着下降，其中主要瓶颈之一是耗时的数论变换 (NTT)。因此，加速 NTT 以适应各种 FHE 参数对于推进 FHE 走向实际应用至关重要。凭借高度可重构和高性能的逻辑结构，现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 在 NTT 加速方面展现出了巨大的潜力。通过将具有强数据依赖性的大点NTT分解为独立且简单的小点NTT，新兴的十步NTT（TNTT）算法直观地实现了更高的并行性，从而与传统算法相比有潜力探索更好的性能。然而，我们的定量分析表明，由于额外的不同大小的转置和 Hadamard 产品，随着并行度的增加，TNTT 表现出显着的性能下降。本文提出了 AutoNest，一种高效且可扩展的硬件架构，以及 TNTT 的加速器自动生成框架。所提出的硬件架构通过以下方式最大限度地提高性能：1）采用 2D 块分解数据流来解决转置逻辑中的关键路径延迟，从而提高时钟频率。 2）集成算法级无成本旋转因子融合，以减少Hadamard产品中模乘的数量，从而允许更高的芯片并行度。此外，我们还提供了一个加速器生成框架，可进行自动设计空间探索，以在目标 FPGA 的资源预算下为用户定义的 FHE 参数制定高性能的 TNTT 架构。 AMD-Xilinx U280 FPGA 上的实验结果表明，与之前的设计相比，AutoNest 生成的 NTT 加速器平均加速了 2.31 美元。
